name: Turkey Tropicale
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the turkey pieces with chicken coating mix according to package directions.
2. Arrange the turkey pieces in a single layer in an 8-inch baking dish. Bake uncovered at 400°F for 40 minutes.
3. In a medium skillet, melt the butter.
4. Add brown sugar, stirring constantly until melted.
5. Stir in orange juice and rum, then add cornstarch; whisk together and gradually add to the sugar mixture.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, stirring constantly, until the sauce is thick and clear (about 3 minutes).
7. Add bananas and cook until heated through (about 1 minute).
8. Place the baked turkey on a serving plate. Pour the banana sauce over the turkey and serve.
Makes 4 servings.
